name: Glare Card
summary: A sophisticated card component featuring a dynamic glare effect that simulates light reflecting off a glossy surface, with the glare position responding to cursor movement for realistic interactive feedback.
detailedDescription: The Glare Card component creates a convincing illusion of light reflecting off a glossy, reflective card surface through a dynamic glare effect that responds to cursor position. As users move their mouse over the card, a bright gradient glare tracks the cursor, simulating how light would reflect off a physical glossy surface like a photograph or laminated card. The effect uses radial gradients with careful opacity control to create the realistic glare appearance. The glare intensity, size, and falloff are configurable to achieve anything from subtle sheen to bold glossy reflection. Combined with subtle 3D transforms, the card can also tilt slightly toward the cursor, enhancing the physical illusion. The effect includes smooth transitions that prevent the glare from feeling jittery or mechanical. Perfect for product showcases, photo portfolios, premium content cards, or any context where adding tactile, physical realism through light simulation enhances perceived quality. The glare effect creates an immediate impression of polish and attention to detail that elevates standard card presentations.
purpose: Simulate realistic light glare reflecting off glossy card surfaces
Create tactile, physical illusion through light reflection
Respond to cursor movement with dynamic glare positioning
Add premium polish through sophisticated visual effects
Enhance perceived quality with realistic light simulation
behavior: Tracks cursor position over card surface
Positions radial gradient glare at cursor location
Simulates light reflection off glossy physical surface
Optionally tilts card toward cursor for 3D effect
Applies smooth interpolation preventing jittery motion
Configurable glare intensity, size, and falloff
Returns smoothly to neutral when cursor exits
visualCharacteristics: Dynamic glare tracking cursor like light reflection
Realistic light simulation creating physical illusion
Sophisticated effect elevating standard card presentations
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
